name: How do I file a slip and fall claim after work accident in West Valley City?
description: Report to employer ASAP, file with UT Labor Commission, provide evidence—lawyer helps navigate denials.[2]

mainEntity.name: How do I file a slip and fall claim after work accident in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report to employer ASAP, file with UT Labor Commission, provide evidence—lawyer helps navigate denials.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Notify your employer in writing within 30 days, then file a workers' comp claim with the state labor commission.** Utah requires formal reporting to trigger benefits like medical care and wage replacement.[2][5] Gather incident reports, medical records, and photos as evidence. The insurer investigates; if denied, request a hearing. Deadlines are strict—missing them bars your claim. Hire an attorney experienced in Utah workers' comp for guidance through the process.
